subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan, spoken on 1906-06-12
subcodes.first_line: In the end, all will be well and happy times will come. 'Once again a time will come as sweet as sugar.' The time will come when the procession of pilgrims of all lands will be densely extended
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
